SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.controller.strategy

Interface GameModeUIStrategy

All Known Implementing Classes:
EndlessModeUIStrategy, LevelModeUIStrategy, TwoPlayerModeUIStrategy
public interface GameModeUIStrategy
Strategy interface for game mode-specific UI behavior. Enables different UI logic for Endless, Level, and Two-Player modes.
Author:
Dong, Jia

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    initialize(CommonUIManager commonUI)
    Initializes UI components for this game mode.
    default void
    onGameOver()
    Called when the game ends.
    void
    onGameStart()
    Called when a new game starts.
    default void
    onGameTick()
    Called on each game loop tick.
    default void
    onPause()
    Called when the game is paused.
    default void
    onResume()
    Called when the game is resumed from pause.
    default void
    updateBrickDisplay(ViewData brick)
    Updates brick display when the current piece changes.
    void
    updateLines(int lines)
    Updates the lines cleared display.
    default void
    updateScore(int score)
    Updates the score display.

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      void initialize(CommonUIManager commonUI)
      Initializes UI components for this game mode. Called once when the mode is activated.
      Parameters:
      commonUI - the common UI manager for shared components

    • onGameStart

      void onGameStart()
      Called when a new game starts. Performs mode-specific initialization for the new game session.

    • onGameTick

      default void onGameTick()
      Called on each game loop tick. Default implementation does nothing.

    • updateBrickDisplay

      default void updateBrickDisplay(ViewData brick)
      Updates brick display when the current piece changes. Default implementation does nothing (handled by GuiController).

      Note: This method is reserved for future extensions. Currently, brick display updates are handled directly by GuiController.

      Parameters:
      brick - the view data containing brick information

      Note: Reserved for future use - not currently invoked

    • updateScore

      default void updateScore(int score)
      Updates the score display. Default implementation does nothing.
      Parameters:
      score - the current score value

    • updateLines

      void updateLines(int lines)
      Updates the lines cleared display.
      Parameters:
      lines - the number of lines cleared

    • onPause

      default void onPause()
      Called when the game is paused. Default implementation does nothing (handled by GameTimelineManager).

      Note: This method is reserved for future extensions. Currently, pause logic is handled directly by GameTimelineManager and GuiController.

      Note: Reserved for future use - not currently invoked

    • onResume

      default void onResume()
      Called when the game is resumed from pause. Default implementation does nothing (handled by GameTimelineManager).

      Note: This method is reserved for future extensions. Currently, resume logic is handled directly by GameTimelineManager and GuiController.

      Note: Reserved for future use - not currently invoked

    • onGameOver

      default void onGameOver()
      Called when the game ends. Default implementation does nothing (handled by GuiController).

      Note: This method is reserved for future extensions. Currently, game over logic is handled directly by GuiController.

      Note: Reserved for future use - not currently invoked
